page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, providing a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The memory configuration consists of 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core processing capabilities. The instance achieves top-tier results in multi-core CPU performance, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and software compilation tasks. It also demonstrates strong performance in database operations, ray tracing, and encryption tests. Conversely, single-core performance, memory bandwidth, and static web serving throughput fall within the average range. Large-model LLM inference is unsupported due to resource constraints, though small-model inference performs strongly.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g7t.16xlarge offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring high multi-core compute capacity without the premium of specialized memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. The lack of bundled local storage requires external block storage, which should be factored into architectural planning. This server is suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation pipelines, database operations, and medium-scale web serving or container orchestration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose server instance equipped with 64 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Featuring 256.0 GB of RAM, it maintains a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Performance benchmarks highlight strong multi-core CPU execution, multi-threaded decompression, and database operations, while single-core metrics and memory bandwidth remain average. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for multi-threaded enterprise workloads, software compilation, and database management systems that require dedicated compute resources without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for multi-threaded workloads and database operations.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 256 GB RAM, delivering strong multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core x86 platform offering balanced memory and strong multi-core performance for enterprise applications and database workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.7 GHz
256 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong multi-core CPU, software compilation, and database performance
Suited for multi-threaded applications and database operations
